body:
Codex control review: **APPROVED for closeout**.

Reviewed PR #282 / commit `113869a` against `f76e001` and the `STATUS-DOC-OPENSAVE-RECONCILE` TASK + EXEC packets.

Findings: no correction required.

Checks performed:
- Diff scope is exactly four docs: `plans/BASELINE.md`, `Status.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, `change.md`.
- Diff is 28 insertions, 0 deletions; no source files and no Cargo files changed.
- `git diff --check f76e001..origin/pr/282` passed locally.
- Source citations for Open/Save wiring match `f76e001`: `save_scene_world_to_path`, `save_project_world_to_path`, `handle_open_request`, `replace_world`, `SaveSource`, and `EditorKeyCommand::Save` are present at the claimed locations.
- Anti-over-claim posture holds: Save-As to a new `.rge-project` tree, menu execution, drag-drop, `io-image`, and World-only CommandBus context remain explicitly open.
- GitHub Actions for `113869a` are green across powershell, Format check, Architecture lints, Supply chain, Workspace tests, and Script bench compile.

The formal handoff review packet is finalized at `ai_handoffs/STATUS-DOC-OPENSAVE-RECONCILE_REVIEW_2026-06-01_11-16-08+0300.md` with `STATUS: APPROVED` and `HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE`.

Note: GitHub would not accept a formal PR approval from the authenticated account because it is the PR author (`Review Can not approve your own pull request`), so this comment records the Codex verdict instead.
